title: drill stability cluster — L7 OOM 후속 5+5 hardening (cgroup cap, htz route, watchdog, container fat, race-free deploy)
rationale: L7 (ubu1+ubu2 동시 sshd userspace wedge from drill stage0/hexa_real OOM, 2026-04-22) 직후 11 layer hardening: (1) hexa_remote stage cgroup MemoryMax=20G, (2) ubu2 runaway_guard Mac-path fix, (3) ubu1 6 deprecated 서비스 disable, (4) htz fallback + bootstrap, (5) Mac liveness watchdog, (6) preflight ssh alias resolution, (7) docker fat image 3호스트 통일, (8) systemd AIRGENOME_TAG env contract, (9) container-deploy race-free helper, (10) ssh Tailscale fallback alias, (11) wrapper pre-flight 단축 + ExecStartPost wait-for-healthy + watchdog 4-axis. convergence/drill_stability.convergence L7-L32 ossified.

refinement_history.diff: G3 own-stack 등록 — 모두 implemented + ossified (L7-L32). 본 entry 는 archived 후보.

user_decision_reason: L7 인시던트 대응 cycle 완결. 후속 학습용 cluster 등록 (G3 hub 가 future cross-repo evidence 로 활용 가능).
